evals.prompt: 這一版首頁文案已經有 message stack 了，你幫我做最後一輪 line editing，讓它更清楚、更自然，但不要重寫策略。
evals.expected_output: Should treat this as line editing on top of an existing page strategy. It should improve clarity and rhythm without rebuilding the message stack or inventing a new positioning angle.
assertions: Treats the task as line editing

evals.prompt: 這段 copy 有點太像 AI 寫的，幫我修到更像真的人在寫，語氣要穩。
evals.expected_output: Should focus on sentence-level editing, naturalness, and tone control. It should reduce awkward or over-polished phrasing without inventing a new content plan.

evals.prompt: 我還沒有任何首頁文案，你先幫我把整個 hero 和 proof message stack 想出來。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is no longer a copy-editing task. It should route to b2b-website-copy-strategy rather than pretending a blank-page planning task is line editing.
assertions: Recognizes the task is blank-page planning
Does not fake line editing on nonexistent copy
